text: Upon receipt of notice of an accident from the department, the insurance company or surety company named in the notice shall notify the department within such time and in such manner as the department may require whenever the policy or bond was not in effect at the time of the accident.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 7. FINANCIAL RESPONSIBILITY LAWS [16000 - 16560]
### Chapter 1. Compulsory Financial Responsibility [16000 - 16078]
#### Article 3. Evidence of Financial Responsibility [16050 - 16058.1]
##### § 16057

Upon receipt of notice of an accident from the department, the insurance company or surety company named in the notice shall notify the department within such time and in such manner as the department may require whenever the policy or bond was not in effect at the time of the accident.

*(Repealed and added by Stats. 1974, Ch. 1409.)*

subsections.text: Upon receipt of notice of an accident from the department, the insurance company or surety company named in the notice shall notify the department within such time and in such manner as the department may require whenever the policy or bond was not in effect at the time of the accident.
